description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult male pedestrian with a lean build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure is dressed in a long-sleeved shirt that appears semi-transparent or worn, revealing some anatomical details and red markings on the chest. He wears straight-cut pants and simple, flat shoes, giving a casual, everyday appearance suitable for urban environments. The facial features are defined, with a stern expression and short, neatly styled hair. The skin tone is pale, and the overall surface texture is matte with some roughness, suggesting a stylized or slightly distressed look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is neutral and balanced.
description: A standing adult male pedestrian in casual attire with a semi-transparent shirt, straight pants, and short hair, arms slightly outstretched. The figure has a matte, slightly rough surface and a neutral, upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, chest markings, and the full front of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the straight cut of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and pants, with no visible markings or accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed posture of the arm and leg.
